name: Can a simple FAQ page help voice search, or do I need a lot more content?
description: A well-written FAQ page can help a lot if it uses real questions, short answers, and clear page structure.

mainEntity.name: Can a simple FAQ page help voice search, or do I need a lot more content?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, but only if the page includes enough context for a search engine to understand the answer. A question heading followed by a concise response usually works better than a long block of text.
acceptedAnswer.description: A well-written FAQ page can help a lot if it uses real questions, short answers, and clear page structure.
